description: 16-bit arithmetic idioms found by 33-op brute-force, len≤8

results.name: shl4
results.sequence: ADD HL,HL ADD HL,HL ADD HL,HL ADD HL,HL

results.name: sext
results.sequence: ADC A,L SBC A,A LD H,A

results.name: not_hl
results.sequence: DEC H XOR H LD L,A

results.name: mul3_hl
results.sequence: LD C,A ADD HL,BC ADD HL,BC

results.name: mul5_hl
results.sequence: LD C,A ADD HL,HL ADD HL,HL ADD HL,BC

results.name: mul10_hl
results.sequence: LD C,A ADD HL,BC ADD HL,HL ADD HL,BC ADD HL,HL

results.name: inc_hl
results.note: native Z80, not in 33-op pool! brute-force found EX DE,HL;INC L;ADD HL,DE (19T)

results.name: dec_hl
results.note: native Z80, not in 33-op pool! brute-force found DEC L;SBC A,L;SBC A,A;LD H,A (16T)

results.name: fp16_neg
results.sequence: EX DE,HL DEC L SHR_HL SBC A,L LD L,A
results.note: better: LD A,L; XOR 0x80; LD L,A (12T)

results.name: fp16_is_zero
results.sequence: ADC A,L NEG SBC A,A LD L,A INC L

notes: FP16 abs/neg found suboptimal sequences because AND/XOR immediate not in 33-op pool. Use idiom search (37-op) for bit-manipulation targets.
